series_metadata.series_description: Applications, official correspondence, proposals, committee meeting minutes, project plans and other supporting and materials related to executing Articulation and Transfer initiatives.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 5 years after creation or receipt then reviewed by state archives for historical value. May be scanned upon receipt and kept as a machine readable copy. ; Electronic: 5 years after creation or receipt then reviewed by state archives for historical value., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
